name: chromedevtools/chrome-devtools-mcp
description: Lets your coding agent (such as Gemini, Claude, Cursor or Copilot) control and inspect a live Chrome browser.

packageArguments.description: Optional: connect to an already-running Chrome (remote debugging / port-forward). Example: http://127.0.0.1:9222

browser_url.description: Optional: connect to an already-running Chrome (remote debugging / port-forward). Example: http://127.0.0.1:9222

packageArguments.name: --browserUrl

packageArguments.description: Use a temporary user-data-dir (true/false). Default: false

isolated.description: Use a temporary user-data-dir (true/false). Default: false

packageArguments.name: --isolated

packageArguments.description: Chrome channel: stable | canary | beta | dev (default: stable).

chrome_channel.description: Chrome channel: stable | canary | beta | dev (default: stable).

packageArguments.name: --channel
